title: calophyllum aerarium
intro: Calophyllum aerarium, also known as the Burmese copal tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its oil, which has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat various health issues. The oil extracted from the Calophyllum aerarium tree is rich in anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The herbal preparations of Calophyllum aerarium include essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, topical creams, and other medicinal products.
